text:
改めて見ると、マルモスって
隙が結構あるんだな。

中距離を意識して、動くって感じかな。
……うん、なんとかなりそうだ。

やっぱりセンパイの戦い方が
一番良いお手本になるよ。
ありがとな

You know, when you step back and watch,
those Marmoths leave themselves wide open
for attacks, huh?

So what you wanna do is stick kind
of mid-range and wait for your chance,
yeah? I guess I could probably do that.

Watching you in battle is seriously the best
way for me to wrap my head around how to
handle myself in combat. Thanks, boss.
